raw_consumer_statement:
On XXXX XXXX, XXXX a reverse charge of {$290.00} showed on my account dated XX/XX/XXXX. The original charge/refund does not show on any of my statements. I called Citibank customer service and fraud department numerous times asking them to show when this transaction appeared. They could not find it. I sent four letters to the main office asking for this data. they responded on XX/XX/XXXX that their records show my account was credited twice - Citibank credited my account for {$290.00} and the merchant credited me {$290.00} - therefore they reversed their credit. BUT they can not show me where/when this original charge/refund was made. 
My last letter dated XX/XX/XXXX was sent certified mail and I stated if I did not receive the {$290.00} refund within ten days I would file a fraud report. As of this date, XX/XX/XXXX they have not refunded the {$290.00} nor responded.
